name: Funko, Inc.
summary: Funko, Inc. is a company that designs and sells licensed pop culture consumer products, including collectible figures and other merchandise. The company operates through its subsidiary FAH, LLC and sells products tied to entertainment, gaming, sports, and other pop culture properties. Funko markets its products internationally and has pursued product line expansions and growth in international markets.

products.name: Collectible Figures
products.description: Licensed pop culture collectible figures sold under the Funko brand across entertainment, gaming, and sports properties.

partnerships.description: ACON was a major equity owner in FAH, LLC prior to and after Funko's IPO.
TCG acquired 12,520,559 shares of Class A common stock from ACON via a Stock Purchase Agreement dated May 3, 2022.
